name: Nutty Peanut Brittle
recipeIngredient: Peppermint candies or candy canes: 1 cup, finely crushed
Nuts: 1 cup, chopped into coarse pieces (walnuts, pecans, peanuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix well the graham-cracker crumbs and finely crushed peppermint candies.
2. Add melted butter and toss until well mixed.
3. Stir in the chopped nuts.
4. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 15x10-inch jelly-roll pan and press firmly.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until melted and bubbly.
6. Cool completely.
7. Break into pieces.
8. Store in an open container. Will keep for 2 months. Makes about 1 pound.
From Woman's Day, November 15, 1977
